talks.title: Racial and Ethnic Disparities in Breast Cancer Recurrence: A Population-Based Cohort Study
talks.description: Population-based cohort analysis of breast-cancer recurrence disparities in Virginia, with attention to racial and ethnic patterns in follow-up and surveillance.

talks.title: Predicting Breast Cancer Recurrence Using Machine Learning: A Population-Based Approach to Inform Equitable Surveillance Strategies
talks.description: Machine-learning models applied to breast-cancer recurrence prediction, with the goal of informing population-level surveillance strategies that account for disparities.

talks.title: Formative Evaluation of the Safe Passage Program: An Academic–Community Partnership to Reduce Gun Violence in Norfolk, Virginia
talks.description: Community-based evaluation of the Safe Passage Program, a Norfolk Health Department initiative, presented with Dr. Michele Kekeh.

talks.title: Assessing Structural Barriers and Machine Learning Predictive Accuracy in Early-Onset Colorectal Cancer Outcomes
talks.description: Evaluates how structural barriers influence ML-model predictive accuracy in early-onset colorectal-cancer outcomes — with implications for equitable risk-stratification tools.

talks.title: From Principal Component Analysis to Machine Learning: A Comparative Study on Health Indicator Development for Predicting Cancer Outcomes
talks.description: Comparative methods study on building health-indicator composites for cancer-outcome prediction, contrasting traditional PCA approaches with supervised ML.

talks.title: Towards Culturally Competent Mental Health: Identifying an Asian American Population at Risk of Undiagnosed Mental Illness
talks.description: Complex-survey analysis identifying Asian American subgroups at risk of undiagnosed mental illness, with Anne Dumadag.

talks.title: Work Stress Levels Among Hospital-Based Lactation Consultants Amidst a Public Health Crisis
talks.description: Cross-sectional study of occupational stress among hospital lactation consultants during the COVID-19 pandemic.

talks.title: Using Machine Learning to Identify Influential Contextual Factors of Late-Stage Diagnosis Among Early-Onset Colorectal Cancer
talks.description: Feature-importance analysis in ML models of late-stage colorectal-cancer diagnosis, focused on contextual and neighborhood-level predictors.

talks.title: Assessing the Impacts of the COVID-19 Pandemic on Hispanic/Latino Farmworkers
talks.description: Mixed-methods characterization of pandemic-era stressors on Hispanic/Latino farmworkers in the Eastern U.S.

talks.title: A Combined Approach Using AUC and Propensity Score Methods
talks.description: Methods work on combining propensity-score adjustment with AUC-based risk prediction, presented at the 2018 MBSW.

talks.title: The Performance of Different Propensity Score Methods for Estimating the Area Under the Curve
talks.description: Simulation study comparing propensity-score methods for conditional-AUC estimation; Georgia State University.

talks.title: Adjusting for Covariates Using Propensity Scores When AUC Is Used as Measure of Risk Effect
talks.description: Doctoral work on propensity-score methods for AUC-based risk-effect estimation, presented at the 2014 Joint Statistical Meetings.
